author: asdf142
title: Ads ads ads
content:
I guess full screen ads undismissable until the timer runs out are the norm now. FOR OFFLINE PLAYING?!
I went offline exactly because of thisbs. 

I see VLC can now play from folders, with no ads.

author: Georginhioz
title: Great app
content:
Great application for music streaming. I choose it instead of VLC due to better audio codecs and smarter interface.
I purchased the lifetime Premium version.

author: sorinlaz
title: Works as I always wanted
content: Such an unexpectedly good ap. Easy to use, its best feature is listening directly to songs and video saved in Onedrive and such.

author: Nelvis1968
title: Help
content: I bought the application with a different email address.  Now I'm back in the system.  Can I use the application for free?  Thanks for the help!

author: Condrasto
title: Excelenta
content: Am incercat mai multe, asta e cea mai completa.

author: Luciano_boy
title: Exact ce am cautat
content: Este prima aplicatie care o gasesc in store din sectionea muzica care ma satisface 80%,  si sunt foarte reconascator.

author: Iulian%
title: Drain battery
content: Drain battery for iPhone SE 2016, 100%-0% 2,5 hours

author: valyvis10
title: Ok for play another folder
content: I use this for playing vradio record folder.

author: dane2090
title: Cel mai prosta aplicație care am văzut-o

author: alxoxi
title: i need help
content: how do i download music on this app?

author: magikaldreams
title: Last update
content: Was a good app, but they broke it with last update. For 1h of background play made my phone from 100% batery to 40%. So had to remove the app... if they will fix i will change my review.

author: b0gT
title: Great for streaming from the cloud
content:
I use it to stream my music from Onedrive.
The good thing is that you don't have to download the files from cloud, or will stream them directly, therefore space on your device is used just for caching.
I would like to see in the library the possibility to sort the music by year. It's useful when you have a big collection from different periods.
